message:
test(safety): add comprehensive unit tests for safety module

Add 54 new unit tests covering:

src/cli/commands/safety.rs (28 tests):
- truncate_command: UTF-8, emoji, edge cases, boundaries
- format_tier: all tier levels
- Argument parsing: status, log, check subcommands
- Error cases: missing args, invalid values

src/core/safety.rs (17 tests):
- SafetyTier: ordering, equality, serialization
- DcgDecision: allowed/unavailable factories, serialization
- map_severity: all severity levels
- DcgGuard: construction, empty command handling

src/security/command_safety.rs (9 tests):
- approval_hint: formatting
- find_upwards: directory traversal
- SafetyStatus: field validation
- CommandSafetyEvent: serialization

Note: approval_matches tests omitted due to #![forbid(unsafe_code)]
preventing env var manipulation. Covered by E2E safety tests instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
